name: Technical Skills
raw_text: Senuth De Silva Computer Science Undergraduate senuthdesilva43@gmail.com +94 71 980 8282 LinkedIn GitHub Portfolio Education Informatics Institute of Technology (IIT) Bsc in Computer Science bambalapitiya, Srilanka Foundation Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology PROjECTs Career Recommendation System for Undergraduate IT Students Machine Learning Full-Stack Project Feb 2025 Built a real-time job recommendation system that matches student CVs with live job listings using TF-IDF, Word2Vec, and supervised machine learning models. Implemented Explainable AI (XAI) techniques to provide transparent recommendations and improve user trust. Developed a skill gap analysis module to deliver personalized, actionable career guidance for IT undergraduates. Mind forge fullstack Full-Stack Development Team Project Contributed to the development of a full-stack e-learning platform enabling users to learn web development, earn certifications, and publish technical blogs. Implemented secure authentication and session management using JWT, bcrypt, and cookie-parser. Designed and developed a gamified quiz system (in progress) allowing instructors to create interactive quizzes with real- time student participation and ranking. Project GitHub Repo Project Link Forever(E-Commerce website) Frontend Frontend Development Developed a responsive e-commerce frontend for a clothing platform using React.js and Tailwind CSS. Integrated UI components and optimized user experience for product browsing and interaction. Live Project Project Link Cat vs Dog Image Classification System Deep Learning Python (Jupyter Notebook, PyCharm) Jan 2025 Designed and trained Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image classification with advanced preprocessing and data augmentation techniques. Achieved 92.98 accuracy and 90.66 classification performance through model optimization and evaluation metrics. Westminster University Shopping System Object-Oriented Programming (Java) Jan 2025 Developed a shopping system applying core OOP principles such as encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism. Designed modular and scalable components for product management and user interaction. TECHNICAL SKILLS Languages Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS3, SQL Web Technologies React.js, Next.js, Three.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js Cloud DevOps AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda),GitHub Actions, Backend Frameworks REST Framework Databases PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, AI/ML TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, OpenAI GPT CERTIFICATIONS Foundation Certificate in Higher Education in Informatics Institute Of Technology IIT The Complete Full-Stack Web Development Bootcamp Udemy Microsoft Azure Machine Learning Fundamentals Linkdin DevOps Beginners to Advanced with Projects Udemy Project Management Simplified Project Management Institute Python Programming Online course Linkdin
